case_title: JAMES BUMATAI VS. TAMARA RENEE THOMAS THORPE ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100089226)
